data.title: Ronald McDonald House Greater Hudson Valley Elects Municipal Credit Union’s Toni-Ann Sforza to Board of Directors
data.description: In Hudson Valley, New York, the MCU Foundation, the charitable branch of Municipal Credit Union (MCU), and Ronald McDonald House of the Greater Hudson Valley (RMHGHV) have revealed the appointment of Toni-Ann Sforza as Chief Operating Officer (COO) of MCU to the Board of Directors of RMHGHV. Sforza, with over 20 years of expertise in financial services and organizational development, joins the board during a period of growth and influence for RMHGHV. Sforza, currently serving as COO of MCU, will bring her leadership experience to the board.

data.title: PANTHERx® Rare Pharmacy Earns 2026 MMIT Patient Choice Award for Patient Satisfaction
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 28, 2026, PANTHERx® Rare, a renowned provider of patient access and support services for personalized rare disease care, was honored with the 2026 MMIT Patient Choice Award in the Independent Specialty Pharmacy division. This recognition was presented at a ceremony held by Asembia.

data.title: Ivan Soto-Wright Delivers Keynote at JA Miami's Largest-Ever Company Program Competition
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Ivan Soto-Wright, the CEO and Founder of MoonPay and the Soto-Wright Foundation, gave a keynote speech at Miami-Dade College during the 4th Annual Company Program Competition held by Junior Achievement of Greater Miami. The event drew in a crowd of (number) attendees as Soto-Wright shared insights and perspectives with the participants. The event showcased innovative ideas and talents of young entrepreneurs in the Miami area, highlighting the importance of fostering business skills among the youth. Soto-Wright's presence at the competition added significant value to the occasion, further elevating the reputation and success of the event.

data.title: Appian Congratulates 2026 Partner Award Winners for Delivering Impact with AI and Process Orchestration
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on April 28, 2026, Appian revealed the recipients of the Partner Awards during its worldwide conference, Appian World. The winners, acknowledged for their inventive solutions on the Appian Platform, have made a substantial client impact. Appian, listed on Nasdaq as APPN, hosted the event where these outstanding partners were celebrated for their achievements.

data.title: Herbal Supplements Market to Reach USD 75.41 Bn by 2031 Driven by Growing Demand for Plant-Based Remedies, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, on April 28, 2026, it was reported that the herbal supplements market is expected to experience significant growth. Mordor Intelligence forecasts an increase in market size from USD 57.03 billion in 2026 to USD 75.41 billion by 2031, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.75% during the period of 2026 to 2031. This growth is attributed to changes in consumer lifestyles...

data.title: Resolutions at ASSA ABLOY AB's Annual General Meeting April 28, 2026
data.description: On April 28, 2026, the Annual General Meeting of ASSA ABLOY AB took place in Stockholm, Sweden. During the meeting, the income statements and balance sheets were approved, and discharge from liability was granted. The event marked a significant moment for the company as they assessed their financial standings and operational performance.

data.title: Allied Market Research: Demand for Bone Health Supplements is Expected to Hit $23.1 billion by 2034, Growing at a CAGR of 5.3%
data.description: The global market for calcium, vitamin D, collagen, and glucosamine is witnessing a surge in demand driven by factors such as the increasing prevalence of osteoporosis, a growing geriatric population, and rising awareness about preventive healthcare. According to Ken Research, these trends are contributing to the expansion of the market. As of April 28, 2026, in PORTLAND, Ore., it is reported that the market is experiencing significant growth as these key factors continue to drive demand.

data.title: What Homeowners Learn Too Late: Foundation Damage Often Isn't Covered
data.description: Alpha Structural warns homeowners facing issues like cracked and sloping floors, altered drainage, or shifting retaining walls about the potentially high costs involved. Many find out too late that standard insurance policies may not cover the underlying cause of the damage. This message was delivered in Los Angeles on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Texas Instruments launches the TI-84 Evo Graphing Calculator -- the most advanced TI-84 ever built
data.description: Texas Instruments has introduced the TI-84 Evo Graphing Calculator specifically designed for modern math classrooms. This new calculator boasts enhanced hardware, improved math capabilities, and a focus on providing an uninterrupted learning environment. The launch of the TI-84 Evo highlights Texas Instruments' dedication to education over the past 35 years.

data.title: Blue Moon Consolidates Springer Tungsten Claims with Acquisition of Claims from GoldPlay LLC and a Private Party
data.description: In Toronto on April 28, 2026, Blue Moon Metals Inc. revealed its agreement to acquire specific claims neighboring the Springer Mine in Pershing County. The company, listed on both TSXV as MOON and NASDAQ as BMM, expressed satisfaction with this development.

data.title: IRG Mexico Expands Portfolio with Strategic Acquisitions Totaling Over 600,000 Sq. Ft. Across Durango and Guanajuato
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Los Angeles, one of the leading figures in commercial and industrial real estate in the U.S., Industrial Realty Group, LLC (IRG), revealed the expansion of its international presence through IRG Mexico (IRGM). This move signifies a significant development for IRG, known as a major owner and developer in the industry. This expansion emphasizes the company’s strategy to increase its footprint globally and tap into new markets.

data.title: Torch Dental Expands Offering with Young Innovations Partnership
data.description: A company called Torch Dental in New York has recently announced their new partnerships aimed at improving access to top-notch supplies and equipment for dental practices. The partnerships will guarantee competitive pricing and a more efficient purchasing process through their platform, which now boasts an expanded catalog of products. This initiative is set to benefit a large number of dental practices across the industry.

data.title: IMPACT Community Capital Names Andrew Zimmerman as Chief Investment Officer
data.description: In San Francisco, a notable affordable housing debt investment manager, IMPACT Community Capital, has appointed Andrew Zimmerman as the new Chief Investment Officer. Zimmerman will now oversee investment strategy, portfolio management, and capital deployment, emphasizing the organization's commitment to a disciplined investment approach and lasting growth. This promotion for Zimmerman recognizes his significant contributions to the company.

data.title: Pizza Nova Welcomes Back Beloved One-Day “That’s Amore Pizza for Kids” Event on May 12 in Support of Variety Ontario
data.description: In Toronto, on May 12, 2026, Pizza Nova will be selling medium cheese or pepperoni pizzas for a discounted price of $5.99. For every pizza sold, $1 will be contributed to Variety Ontario.

data.title: First time in a while, LNG traffic in strait halted. The first fully loaded tanker crossed led by Abu Dhabi's state oil company, per Kpler.
data.description: The transportation of liquefied natural gas has been successfully obstructed. According to maritime data firm Kpler, a vessel operated by Abu Dhabi’s state oil company was able to pass through.

data.title: Americans Are Building Their Emergency Savings, But Gaps Remain Across Age and Gender
data.description: CPAs are encouraging consumers to enhance their savings strategies as Financial Literacy Month concludes. A recent survey conducted by The Harris Poll for the American Institute of CPAs (AICPA) revealed important insights. The survey emphasized the need for financial education, highlighting that a significant percentage of individuals may benefit from improving their savings plans. With Financial Literacy Month coming to an end, experts underscore the importance of taking proactive steps towards securing a stable financial future.
